title: At the Kela office
tagline: New in the country: the Kela card, benefits and what papers you need.

lines.fi: Mä muutin just Suomeen. Miten mä haen Kela-korttii?
lines.en: I just moved to Finland. How do I apply for a Kela card?
Have you already registered in the population records?
Yeah, I have a Finnish personal identity code.

lines.fi: Hyvä. Sit voit hakee Kelan etuuksii verkossa.
lines.en: Good. Then you can apply for Kela's benefits online.
A passport and a work contract are enough to start.
How long does processing the application take?

lines.fi: Yleensä pari viikkoo. Saat päätöksen postiin.
lines.en: Usually a couple of weeks. You'll get the decision by mail.
No problem. Feel free to ask more.
